nodes.name: Olive-flanked ground robin
nodes.summary: The olive-flanked ground robin (Dessonornis anomalus), also known as the olive-flanked robin-chat, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Malawi, and Mozambique. Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests. References

nodes.name: Olive-flanked ground robin
nodes.summary: Olive-flanked ground robin（Dessonornis anomalus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Olive-flanked ground robin。

nodes.name: Dessonornis
nodes.summary: Dessonornis（Dessonornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Archer's ground robin、Olive-flanked ground robin、Cape robin-chat等4种鸟类。
